data.name: Hentai Spacegirl
data.detailed_description:
Drift into the glowing depths of the galaxy, where a gorgeous space explorer is ready to reveal far more than cosmic secrets — but only to those skilled enough to solve her puzzles. Hentai Spacegirl is an erotic puzzle game where every completed challenge uncovers intimate, seductive artwork of our celestial heroine.


A blend of sci-fi ambience, sensual illustrations, and relaxing puzzle mechanics creates an irresistible experience that pulls you deeper into the stars.

Game Features:

1. Erotic Sci-Fi Illustrations

Unlock steamy artwork featuring the spacegirl in provocative poses, zero-gravity moments, and neon-lit cosmic environments.
Each puzzle solved brings you closer to her curves, charm, and interstellar allure.

2. Three Puzzle Modes

• 15-Puzzle (Sliding Puzzle) – A classic challenge with a cosmic twist.
• Swipe Puzzle – Drag, swap, and reconstruct your space beauty.
• Rotate Puzzle – Turn each tile until her most tempting scenes come into view.

3. Two Difficulty Levels

• 3×3 – Fast, satisfying reveals.
• 4×4 – More challenge, more teasing, and more reward.

4. Dark Cosmic Atmosphere

Smooth ambient sci-fi music and glowing space aesthetics immerse you in the erotic vastness of the galaxy.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10/11
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3 10100F/AMD Ruzen 3 3100
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GTX 1060/RX 480
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
